title: tripleurospermum oreades
intro: Tripleurospermum oreades, also known as mountain everlasting, is a plant species within the carrot family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tripleurospermum oreades include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the aerial parts of the plant being the most commonly used for medicinal purposes.
